title: CreateWebhookRequest
description: Request body for creating a new webhook subscription.

endpoint.description: The URL to send webhook event payloads to.

events.description: Array of event names to subscribe to. Use '*' to subscribe to all events.

task_id.description: Optional task ID to scope webhook events to a specific task.

list_id.description: Optional list ID to scope webhook events to a specific list.

folder_id.description: Optional folder ID to scope webhook events to a specific folder.

space_id.description: Optional space ID to scope webhook events to a specific space.
